summary: Pass 13: SAST remediation cycle. Eliminated 5 HIGH-severity MD5 findings in scripts/ (usedforsecurity=False), suppressed 4 core-source false positives (2 B104, 2 B310), and 1 test false positive (B103). Core source SAST findings reduced from 4 to 0 (MEDIUM+ severity, MEDIUM+ confidence). HIGH severity findings reduced from 6 to 0 across entire repo. All validation tiers green: 8,351 tests passing, 0 failures.
next_actions: Begin air-gapped CTEM feature development (core product differentiation)
Add bandit to CI with --confidence-level medium (0 findings at this threshold)
Add pytest-randomly to CI (catch test-ordering issues)
Replace risk_scorer.py string concat with .format() (eliminate last 3 LOW-confidence FPs)
Integrate EPSS API caching to reduce brain_pipeline test network dependency
Add nosec annotations to scripts/ B310/B108 findings for completeness
